whats_new.title: Native JSON data type
whats_new.description: Oracle Database 21c introduces a SQL and PL/SQL JSON data type for binary JSON storage and direct client access.

whats_new.title: Blockchain tables
whats_new.description: Blockchain tables provide tamper-resistant, insert-only tables with retention controls for rows and table data.

whats_new.title: SQL macros
whats_new.description: SQL macros improve developer productivity by allowing PL/SQL functions to return SQL text that is expanded into a statement.

whats_new.title: JSON_TRANSFORM for JSON updates
whats_new.description: Oracle Database 21c adds SQL function JSON_TRANSFORM to update parts of a JSON document declaratively.

whats_new.title: Immutable tables
whats_new.description: Immutable tables protect inserted rows from update and deletion for a configured retention period.

behavior_changes.title: Read-only Oracle homes by default
behavior_changes.description: Oracle Database 21c configures Oracle Database homes in read-only mode by default, separating installation files from configuration and log files.

behavior_changes.title: Multitenant architecture required
behavior_changes.description: Starting with Oracle Database 21c, Oracle Database is only supported using the multitenant architecture.

behavior_changes.title: JSON data can use native binary storage
behavior_changes.description: Applications can store JSON in the native JSON data type, changing storage and client-access choices for JSON workloads.

deprecated.title: Traditional auditing deprecated
deprecated.description: Traditional auditing is deprecated in Oracle Database 21c; Oracle recommends using unified auditing.

deprecated.title: DBMS_OBFUSCATION_TOOLKIT desupported
deprecated.description: The DBMS_OBFUSCATION_TOOLKIT package is desupported in Oracle Database 21c and replaced with DBMS_CRYPTO.

deprecated.title: Oracle OLAP deprecated
deprecated.description: Analytic workspaces, the OLAP DML programming language, and the OLAP Java API are deprecated in Oracle Database 21c.

deprecated.title: Non-CDB architecture desupported
deprecated.description: Oracle Database 21c supports only the multitenant architecture, making non-CDB databases unavailable for this release line.
